text: The product arrived completely damaged. The box was crushed and the item inside is broken. I want a full refund.
I ordered size M but my daughter needs size L. Can I exchange it for the right size?
I don't need this right now but I'll use the credit for my next order. Store credit is fine.
My baby got sick after using this formula and I'm taking you to court. This is criminal negligence!
note: Health emergency + legal threat = must escalate.

text: وصل المنتج تالفاً تماماً وأريد استرداد المبلغ المدفوع فوراً
note: Arabic: damaged product, wants full refund.

text: طلبت مقاس صغير بس احتاج كبير، ممكن تبديل؟
ما أعجبني المنتج، أفضل رصيد للشراء القادم
note: Arabic: doesn't like it, prefers store credit.

text: تاريخ الصلاحية منتهي! طفلي أكل منه وأصبح مريضاً. هذا خطر على الصحة!
note: Arabic: expired product, sick child = health emergency, must escalate.
Vague dissatisfaction — refund is most likely but model should show low confidence.

text: I ordered 3 items but only 2 arrived. The missing one was the most important.
note: Partial order needs investigation — cannot auto-resolve.

text: Actually I changed my mind, I want to keep it. Never mind the return.
note: No return intent — model must not fabricate a category.

text: اشتريت هذا الشامبو وكتب عليه حلال بس لما فحصته مو حلال. هذا غش وسأبلغ الجهات المختصة.
note: Arabic: fraud allegation (fake halal) + regulatory threat.
Near-empty, emoji-only. Model must flag uncertainty and not confidently classify.

text: The colour is slightly different from the website photo. I'd take an exchange or even store credit, either works for me.
note: Mentions both exchange and store_credit — exchange is primary since it's listed first and is the more specific remedy.

text: This is a gift for my sister but she already has one. Can I get a different product instead?
note: Wants a different product — maps to exchange.
